title: The Role of Discourse Markers on Students' Comprehension of Academic  Lectures (At Farsan College)
author: Khadijah Omar Mohammed Habaily, Lec.Ameera Dafa Alla Kabashi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study attempts to investigate  D.M and difficulties of  listening to lectures. Students find problems in understanding  lectures quickly because they don’t know D.M. This study used the  quantitative method by giving subjects apassage to read and questionnaire to answer. The researcher found that  the students commit mistakes and found difficulties in recognizing D.M.
